message:
refactor(wasm): extract string, vector, and compression modules

Phase 2 of wasm.zig refactoring:

- string_column.zig: String buffer handling with getStringBuffer,
  readStringAt, and related exports (346 lines)
- vector_column.zig: Vector access with getVectorInfo, readVectorAt,
  cosineSimilarity, and related exports (288 lines)
- compression.zig: Zstd decompression with zstd_decompress and
  zstd_get_decompressed_size (123 lines)

Each module has its own state synchronization with wasm.zig via
syncStateToModules() called on file open/close. Added unit tests
to each module.

WASM binary size: 188KB (unchanged from before refactoring).
